title: Milk the Dividends on These 3 Cash Cows
text: The term ‘cash cow' refers to a company with significant market share in a mature industry. Typically, it requires minimal capital spending to maintain slow yet predictable growth.

title: LyondellBasell announces decision to acquire Mepol Group
text: Facilities in Poland and Italy will produce recycled and polymer compounds for diverse markets ROTTERDAM, Netherlands and FERRARA, Italy, March 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ — LyondellBasell (NYSE: LYB) and Mepol Group today announced they have entered into a definitive agreement for LyondellBasell to acquire Mepol Group, a manufacturer of recycled, high-performing technical compounds located in Italy and Poland, […]...

title: March 2023 Stock Considerations
text: 2023 is flying by as two months are already in the books and that fact simply highlights to me the importance of staying invested in the stock market during the good times and bad. VZ stock is trading with a low forward PE of just over 8 and sports a very juicy yield getting close to 7% and a moderate payout ratio of around 51% making this dividend appear to be very safe going forward.
